authorization_scope.requires_next_authorization: R241-20G3 push execution requires separate authorization

constraint_analysis.key_constraint: push ONLY 0bb97b51 without pushing 5 preceding foundation commits
constraint_analysis.challenge: 0bb97b51 depends on ae9cc034 (base) — cannot be cherry-picked standalone without its changes

base_commit_analysis.reason: CAND-017 changes are in harness/lead_agent which is standalone from foundation batches

option_1_path_limited_restore.name: path_limited_restore_isolated_branch
option_1_path_limited_restore.description: Create isolated branch from origin/main, use path_limited_restore to restore only CAND-017 files
pros: Can cherry-pick or path-restore individual files
cons: Requires verifying which files in 0bb97b51 are CAND-017 specific vs base changes
option_1_path_limited_restore.files_to_restore: TBD — need to verify file list

option_2_cherry_pick_without_base.name: cherry_pick_with_path_filter
option_2_cherry_pick_without_base.description: Use git cherry-pick with --no-commit, then reset specific files to isolate CAND-017
option_2_cherry_pick_without_base.reason: CAND-017 changes in agent.py may reference base that doesn't exist on origin/main

option_3_manual_patch.name: manual_diff_apply
option_3_manual_patch.description: git diff 0bb97b51 vs ae9cc034 for CAND-017 files only, apply as new commit

recommended_strategy.reason: Documented strategy, clean isolation, proven approach from R241-19I6
steps: 1. Verify CAND-017 files in 0bb97b51 vs ae9cc034
3. Use path_limited_restore to restore only CAND-017 files (agent.py, __init__.py)
6. Report to user for final G3 authorization

verification_checklist.cand017_file_isolation: REQUIRED — must verify only harness/lead_agent files are CAND-017 specific
verification_checklist.push_affects_only_new_branch: YES — does not touch main or origin/main
verification_checklist.requires_user_authorization_for_push_exe: YES — G3 required for actual push

next_phase_requirement.reason: G2 is strategy review only; G3 is execution with user sign-off
